title: chelidonium vitellinum
intro: Chelidonium vitellinum, commonly known as celandine, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and red sap. The medicinal properties of celandine lie in its alkaloid content, particularly berberine, which has antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of celandine include its potential to treat digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Celandine can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or ointment, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
